item.description: Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., who had held his Senate seat since 2003 and was seen as a war hawk and significant voice on defense and foreign policy, has died at the age of 71 from a “sudden illness.” NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin and Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker report on Graham’s rise in Congress, his relationship with President Donald Trump, and his views on the wars in Iran and between Russia and Ukraine.

media:content.media:title: Special Report: Looking back on the political legacy of Sen. Lindsey Graham
media:content.media:description: Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., who had held his Senate seat since 2003 and was seen as a war hawk and significant voice on defense and foreign policy, has died at the age of 71 from a “sudden illness.” NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin and Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker report on Graham’s rise in Congress, his relationship with President Donald Trump, and his views on the wars in Iran and between Russia and Ukraine.

item.title: Special Report: Looking back on the political legacy of Sen. Lindsey Graham

item.description: Iranian state media reports that the Revolutionary Guard says the Strait of Hormuz is closed until further notice. It comes as Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is vowing revenge for his father’s killing, saying it is the “demand” of his country. Khamenei has not been seen since he was severely injured when the war began. His father was killed early in the war by U.S. and Israeli air strikes. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin has the latest.

media:content.media:title: Iran’s supreme leader vows revenge for father’s killing
media:content.media:description: Iranian state media reports that the Revolutionary Guard says the Strait of Hormuz is closed until further notice. It comes as Iran’s new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is vowing revenge for his father’s killing, saying it is the “demand” of his country. Khamenei has not been seen since he was severely injured when the war began. His father was killed early in the war by U.S. and Israeli air strikes. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin has the latest.

item.title: Iran’s supreme leader vows revenge for father’s killing

item.description: In extra time, England defeated Norway to clinch a spot in the World Cup semifinals. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

media:content.media:title: England defeats Norway for World Cup semifinals spot
media:content.media:description: In extra time, England defeated Norway to clinch a spot in the World Cup semifinals. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports.

item.title: England defeats Norway for World Cup semifinals spot

item.description: Lautaro Martínez apareció en los últimos minutos del tiempo extra para sentenciar la clasificación de Argentina. Tras una rápida contra, el delantero aprovechó un rebote del arquero suizo y empujó el balón para marcar el definitivo 3-1.

media:content.media:title: Lautaro Martínez liquida a Suiza en el tiempo extra y Argentina pasa a semifinales
media:content.media:description: Lautaro Martínez apareció en los últimos minutos del tiempo extra para sentenciar la clasificación de Argentina. Tras una rápida contra, el delantero aprovechó un rebote del arquero suizo y empujó el balón para marcar el definitivo 3-1.

item.title: Lautaro Martínez liquida a Suiza en el tiempo extra y Argentina pasa a semifinales

item.description: Lionel Scaloni destacó el esfuerzo de Argentina. Julián Álvarez, Lautaro Martínez, José Manuel López y Leandro Paredes compartieron sus sensaciones, mientras Gregor Kobel y Murat Yakin lamentaron la eliminación de Suiza.

media:content.media:title: Argentina elimina a Suiza y así reaccionaron los protagonistas del partido
media:content.media:description: Lionel Scaloni destacó el esfuerzo de Argentina. Julián Álvarez, Lautaro Martínez, José Manuel López y Leandro Paredes compartieron sus sensaciones, mientras Gregor Kobel y Murat Yakin lamentaron la eliminación de Suiza.

item.title: Argentina elimina a Suiza y así reaccionaron los protagonistas del partido

item.description: Pese al enorme peso histórico del duelo de Argentina ante los ingleses y las Malvinas de por medio, el DT Campeón del Mundo apuntó solo a lo futbolístico; además, dio mérito a sus jugadores tras el triunfo ante Suiza, explicó el gol de Mac Allister y más.

media:content.media:title: Scaloni tras el pase a Semifinal ante Inglaterra: "Es un partido de fútbol, no hay más que eso"
media:content.media:description: Pese al enorme peso histórico del duelo de Argentina ante los ingleses y las Malvinas de por medio, el DT Campeón del Mundo apuntó solo a lo futbolístico; además, dio mérito a sus jugadores tras el triunfo ante Suiza, explicó el gol de Mac Allister y más.

item.title: Scaloni tras el pase a Semifinal ante Inglaterra: "Es un partido de fútbol, no hay más que eso"

item.description: Inglaterra eliminó a Noruega con un doblete de Jude Bellingham y Argentina venció a Suiza con goles de Mac Allister, Julián Álvarez y Lautaro Martínez. Por primera vez, las cuatro mejores selecciones del ranking FIFA jugarán las semifinales.

media:content.media:title: Radar Mundial: Inglaterra y Argentina completan unas semifinales de lujo
media:content.media:description: Inglaterra eliminó a Noruega con un doblete de Jude Bellingham y Argentina venció a Suiza con goles de Mac Allister, Julián Álvarez y Lautaro Martínez. Por primera vez, las cuatro mejores selecciones del ranking FIFA jugarán las semifinales.

item.title: Radar Mundial: Inglaterra y Argentina completan unas semifinales de lujo

item.description: Nuestros expertos analizaron la clasificación de Argentina a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 tras vencer a Suiza. Además, repasaron el triunfo de Inglaterra sobre Noruega y las claves que marcaron el encuentro.

media:content.media:title: Argentina ya está en semifinales y los expertos también analizan el triunfo de Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos analizaron la clasificación de Argentina a las semifinales de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026 tras vencer a Suiza. Además, repasaron el triunfo de Inglaterra sobre Noruega y las claves que marcaron el encuentro.

item.title: Argentina ya está en semifinales y los expertos también analizan el triunfo de Inglaterra

item.description: El capitán argentino no marcó gol, pero fue el orquestador de la albiceleste que tuvo un sufrido encuentro contra Suiza y aquí te traemos todas sus acciones.

media:content.media:title: Lionel Messi vs. Suiza: cámara exclusiva de todas sus acciones
media:content.media:description: El capitán argentino no marcó gol, pero fue el orquestador de la albiceleste que tuvo un sufrido encuentro contra Suiza y aquí te traemos todas sus acciones.

item.title: Lionel Messi vs. Suiza: cámara exclusiva de todas sus acciones

item.description: La jornada sabatina de cuartos de final protagonizó lindos momentos en los duelos entre Inglaterra vs Noruega y Argentina frente a Suiza.

media:content.media:title: Los golazos que se registraron en los duelos de cuartos de final es lo mejor del día
media:content.media:description: La jornada sabatina de cuartos de final protagonizó lindos momentos en los duelos entre Inglaterra vs Noruega y Argentina frente a Suiza.

item.title: Los golazos que se registraron en los duelos de cuartos de final es lo mejor del día

item.description: Conmovido y contenido, el estratega se guardó los festejos en cada gol de la "Albiceleste" ante Suiza en cuartos de final y al pitazo final se marchó rápido al vestuario con un abrazo a Maxi Rodríguez. Revive cómo vivió cada momento desde la banca.

media:content.media:title: El show de Scaloni en la banca: conmovido y sin festejar en el triunfo de Argentina ante Suiza
media:content.media:description: Conmovido y contenido, el estratega se guardó los festejos en cada gol de la "Albiceleste" ante Suiza en cuartos de final y al pitazo final se marchó rápido al vestuario con un abrazo a Maxi Rodríguez. Revive cómo vivió cada momento desde la banca.

item.title: El show de Scaloni en la banca: conmovido y sin festejar en el triunfo de Argentina ante Suiza

item.description: El delantero argentino señala que lo importantes es recuperar energías y preparar el próximo partido que será aún más desafiante.

media:content.media:title: Lautaro Martínez: “Vamos con un equipo de mucha jerarquía”
media:content.media:description: El delantero argentino señala que lo importantes es recuperar energías y preparar el próximo partido que será aún más desafiante.

item.title: Lautaro Martínez: “Vamos con un equipo de mucha jerarquía”

item.description: El delantero argentino habló tras el triunfo ante Suiza y de cara a la Semifinal ante Inglaterra, compartió sus sensaciones del duelo en Kansas City y lo que espera del partido que lleva una gran carga histórica.

media:content.media:title: López tras triunfo de Argentina: "Es un partido especial; estamos preparados para lo que viene"
media:content.media:description: El delantero argentino habló tras el triunfo ante Suiza y de cara a la Semifinal ante Inglaterra, compartió sus sensaciones del duelo en Kansas City y lo que espera del partido que lleva una gran carga histórica.

item.title: López tras triunfo de Argentina: "Es un partido especial; estamos preparados para lo que viene"

item.description: El mediocampista argentino reconoció que todos los partidos han sido sufridos y no será una excepción frente a Inglaterra en semifinales.

media:content.media:title: Leandro Paredes: “Favoritos no hay en este Mundial”
media:content.media:description: El mediocampista argentino reconoció que todos los partidos han sido sufridos y no será una excepción frente a Inglaterra en semifinales.

item.title: Leandro Paredes: “Favoritos no hay en este Mundial”

item.description: Across the country, calls are growing louder for an investigation into the death of 52-year-old Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. Araujo was shot and killed by ICE officers in Texas after federal officials say he attempted to ram his car into officers, something eyewitnesses have disputed. NBC News’ Priscilla Thompson reports.

media:content.media:title: Sons of migrant killed by ICE in Texas demand answers
media:content.media:description: Across the country, calls are growing louder for an investigation into the death of 52-year-old Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. Araujo was shot and killed by ICE officers in Texas after federal officials say he attempted to ram his car into officers, something eyewitnesses have disputed. NBC News’ Priscilla Thompson reports.

item.title: Sons of migrant killed by ICE in Texas demand answers

item.description: Representative Ro Khanna (D-Calif.) says he was stopped and detained by Israeli settlers with guns when visiting a Palestinian village in the West Bank. Khanna, who is considering a possible 2028 run, says when Israeli troops arrived they sided with the settlers and continued to hold the group he was traveling with. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

media:content.media:title: Congressman detained by Israeli settlers in the West Bank
media:content.media:description: Representative Ro Khanna (D-Calif.) says he was stopped and detained by Israeli settlers with guns when visiting a Palestinian village in the West Bank. Khanna, who is considering a possible 2028 run, says when Israeli troops arrived they sided with the settlers and continued to hold the group he was traveling with. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez reports.

item.title: Congressman detained by Israeli settlers in the West Bank

item.dc:creator: Suzy Khimm
item.description: If you or a loved one has been affected by a gambling problem, NBC News wants to hear from you.

media:content.media:text: Young men using smart phone for sports betting.

item.title: We want to hear about your experience with gambling addiction

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Frank Thorp V
item.description: Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., who was elected to the Senate in 2003 and was a close political ally of President Donald Trump, has died, his office confirmed early Sunday. He was 71.

media:content.media:text: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., questions Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine during a committee hearing on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., on May 12, 2026.
media:content.media:description: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., questions Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine during a committee hearing on Capitol Hill in Washington, D.C., on May 12, 2026.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies at 71 after ‘brief and sudden illness’

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
Dennis Romero
item.description: Two people were killed and three others were wounded in a shooting Saturday at the Salsa on St. Clair festival in Toronto, police said.

media:content.media:text: Two people died and at least four others were wounded in a shooting at a festival in Toronto on July 11, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Two people died and at least four others were wounded in a shooting at a festival in Toronto on July 11, 2026.

item.title: 2 killed, 6 injured at Toronto festival after pair of gunmen shoot at one another

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Leah Kateb, ‘Love Island USA’ star and Skylar re-founder and COO, is teaching millions of people how to smell incredible. Here are her favorite products.

media:content.media:credit: Trever Hoehne; Amazon; Sephora; Art of Skincare
media:content.media:text: Love Island USA star Leah Kateb, who is the re-founder and COO of Skylar, says her favorite products include Lulu Candles, Skylar’s True Love’s Cake fragrance, Havaianas flip flops and Hydrinity retinol.
media:content.media:description: Love Island USA star Leah Kateb, who is the re-founder and COO of Skylar, says her favorite products include Lulu Candles, Skylar’s True Love’s Cake fragrance, Havaianas flip flops and Hydrinity retinol.

media:content.media:credit: Trever Hoehne; Amazon; Sephora; Art of Skincare
media:content.media:text: Love Island USA star Leah Kateb, who is the re-founder and COO of Skylar, says her favorite products include Lulu Candles, Skylar’s True Love’s Cake fragrance, Havaianas flip flops and Hydrinity retinol.
media:content.media:description: Love Island USA star Leah Kateb, who is the re-founder and COO of Skylar, says her favorite products include Lulu Candles, Skylar’s True Love’s Cake fragrance, Havaianas flip flops and Hydrinity retinol.

item.title: Talking Shop with ‘Love Island USA’ star Leah Kateb

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Here’s what to look for when shopping for the best fans on the market. Choose from a range of styles from brands like Vornado, Lasko, Dyson and more.

media:content.media:text: From ceiling fans to handheld options, we talked with an expert about what features to look for when buying a new fan.
media:content.media:description: From ceiling fans to handheld options, we talked with an expert about what features to look for when buying a new fan.

media:content.media:text: From ceiling fans to handheld options, we talked with an expert about what features to look for when buying a new fan.
media:content.media:description: From ceiling fans to handheld options, we talked with an expert about what features to look for when buying a new fan.

item.title: The best cooling fans for a variety of budgets

item.dc:creator: Nicole Saunders
Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Struggling with clogged pores? Dermatologists recommend the best blackhead treatments and cleansers that actually remove and prevent blackheads.

media:content.media:text: Though dermatologists advise against using blackhead extractors at home, they said skin care treatments can be effective.
media:content.media:description: Though dermatologists advise against using blackhead extractors at home, they said skin care treatments can be effective.

media:content.media:text: Though dermatologists advise against using blackhead extractors at home, they said skin care treatments can be effective.
media:content.media:description: Though dermatologists advise against using blackhead extractors at home, they said skin care treatments can be effective.

item.title: How to remove blackheads at home, according to experts

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Amazon has the Brooks Men’s Glycerin 22 Neutral Running Shoe on sale for 45 percent off, bringing the price down to under $100 — shop the deal before it’s gone.

media:content.media:text: NBC Select editors are big fans of this sneaker.
media:content.media:description: NBC Select editors are big fans of this sneaker.

media:content.media:text: NBC Select editors are big fans of this sneaker.
media:content.media:description: NBC Select editors are big fans of this sneaker.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Get 45% off these popular Brooks running shoes
